description: Composition Purple and black dress made of blended fabric, has a ballet wrap, short sleeves with a buttoned tab detail at the shoulder, a concealed zipper at the side and a lace black skirt Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron This dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels – try wearing with a belt. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
